request_payload.exposure_text: As a retired Air Force colonel with 30 years of service, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. The data doesn't lie - countries that maintain strong commitments to mutual defense frameworks see 40% fewer security incidents. We can't afford to weaken our alliances. It's not just about us; it's about maintaining global stability. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
